name: Next Meats Holdings, Inc.
business: Next Meats Holdings, Inc. develops and sells alternative meat products made from plant-based ingredients, primarily soybeans, through its subsidiaries. The products are distributed to supermarkets and restaurants in Japan and other countries via wholesale companies and direct online sales.

exposures.sentence: Through Next Meats Co., Ltd., Next Meats USA, Inc., Next Meats HK Co. Limited, and Next Meats (S) Pte. Ltd., we develop and sell alternative meat products, with ingredients derived from predominantly, plant based materials.

catalysts.event: Begin process of listing on the NASDAQ
catalysts.sentence: During fiscal year 2024, we intend to begin the process of listing on the NASDAQ if our financial situation is conducive to such an effort.
